‹ GalNet Chronicle
Entity Profile
P

Leo Magnus

Person · First seen 3306-10-27 · 10 mentions
Active: 3306-10-27 → 3307-12-09
Mentions Timeline (10 articles)
3307-12-09
Tributes Gathered to Honour Duval Heir
Praetor Leo Magnus thanks pilots for delivering commodities to celebrate the birth of Hadrian Duval's son Hector Mordanticus Duval, while journalist Cassia Carvalho analyses the child's potential impact on Imperial succession.
3307-12-02
Empire Celebrates Newborn Duval
Hadrian Duval's wife Astrid gives birth to a son named Hector Mordanticus Duval, prompting celebrations across the Empire and a commodity gathering initiative in Paresa.
3307-11-02
Hadrian Duval Accepts Senate Protection
Hadrian Duval accepts the Imperial Senate's offer of protection, renaming Nova Imperium to Nova Paresa and endorsing Praetor Leo Magnus as its new leader.
3307-10-15
NMLA Aims to ‘Extinguish the Duval Line’
The NMLA claims responsibility for the Dyson City bombing and declares its intent to exterminate the entire Duval bloodline. ACT reveals Theta Group has split in two.
3307-10-14
Terrorist Attack at Hadrian Duval’s HQ
NMLA bombs strike Dyson City starport in Paresa, killing over 15,000 people. Hadrian Duval's family survives thanks to a last-minute evacuation ordered by Praetor Leo Magnus.
3307-06-14
ACT Continues to Hunt NMLA Terrorists
ACT publishes an update on its NMLA investigation. Senior Agent Tanya Ramirez reports no significant breakthroughs due to the NMLA's dark-comms network and compartmentalised cells. Theta Group has been inactive since the Nine Martyrs bombings. ACT recruits additional personnel from multiple security agencies including Nova Imperium's Praetorian Guard.
3307-05-21
Hadrian Duval Allegations Declared 'Inconclusive'
ACT declares evidence linking Hadrian Duval to the NMLA cannot be authenticated. Inspector Mara Klatt reports the data from Landgrave Delacroix is inconclusive and likely faked. Leo Magnus is seconded to ACT to replace the deceased Captain Niamh Seutonia.
3307-04-05
The Wedding of Hadrian Duval
Imperator Hadrian Augustus Duval of Nova Imperium marries his consort Astrid Minerva in a closed ceremony attended by Princess Aisling Duval. The Imperial Palace and Senate send congratulations while Nova Imperium forces assist in the conflict against Neo-Marlinists.
3306-11-02
Hadrian Duval Saved by Aisling Duval’s Intervention
Princess Aisling Duval intervenes to save Imperator Hadrian Duval after an NMLA assassination attempt, transporting him aboard the INV Achenar's Courage for advanced medical treatment.
3306-10-27
Terrorist Hit Squad Targets Hadrian Duval
NMLA assassins attack Imperator Hadrian Duval at Dyson City in Paresa, severely wounding him. Three killed, four injured. The NMLA claims responsibility, vowing to "sever every head of the Duval hydra."
